message:
fix(messaging): add resolved guard to ServiceObligation preventing double-commit/fail/transfer

ServiceObligation methods (transfer, commit_with_reply, fail) could be
called after the obligation was already resolved, leading to double
commits or aborts against the ledger. The consuming-self pattern was
partially effective but transfer() took &mut self, creating a gap.

Changes:
- Add resolved: bool field tracking whether the obligation has completed
- ensure_active() guard called at the top of transfer/commit/fail
- AlreadyResolved error variant with operation name for diagnostics
- transfer() now takes &mut self consistently (was consuming self)
  and checks resolved before mutating lineage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
